name: TrendLense
description: Smarter Stock Insights, Instantly. Get real-time stock filters, analysis, and smart alerts for your favorite Indian stocks. Make faster, data-driven investment decisions.

name: Free Resume Builder
description: Build a professional, job-winning resume in minutes. Choose from elegant ATS-friendly templates, customize styling, fonts, and colors, and export high-quality PDFs instantly for free..

name: ClearCut — AI Background Remover.
description: Remove the background from any photo instantly and free with ClearCut. AI-powered, unlimited use, no sign-up, no watermark. Works on JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP & TIFF — processed privately in your browser.

name: Bookmarklet Library — Free Browser Utility Tools.
description: A collection of free, drag-and-drop bookmarklets that boost your productivity. Unlock copy-protected pages, generate QR codes, enable dark mode, auto-scroll, and more — no extensions needed.

name: JSONSpace | JSON Formatter and more
description: Free online JSON formatter, validator, tree viewer, CSV converter, and diff tool. Format, beautify, minify, and fix JSON with smart suggestions. No backend required.
